'''jasholo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ignorome|ignorome]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-sh-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ignorome|ignorome]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| jasholo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæsheleth|jæsheleth]] || [[word:jæshelej|jæshelej]] || [[word:jæshelesh|jæshelesh]] || [[word:jæshele|jæshele]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jashosholoth|jashosholoth]] || [[word:jashosholoj|jashosholoj]] || [[word:jashosholosh|jashosholosh]] || [[word:jashosholo|jashosholo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jasholoth|jasholoth]] || [[word:jasholoj|jasholoj]] || [[word:jasholosh|jasholosh]] || [[word:jasholo|jasholo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jashofloth|jashofloth]] || [[word:jashofloj|jashofloj]] || [[word:jashoflosh|jashoflosh]] || [[word:jashoflof|jashoflof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jasholotho|jasholotho]] || [[word:jasholojo|jasholojo]] || [[word:jasholosho|jasholosho]] || [[word:jasholoko|jasholoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jasholoth|jasholoth]] || [[word:jasholoj|jasholoj]] || [[word:jasholosh|jasholosh]] || [[word:jasholo|jasholo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jasholothol|jasholothol]] || [[word:jasholojol|jasholojol]] || [[word:jasholoshol|jasholoshol]] || [[word:jasholokol|jasholokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jasholothotho|jasholothotho]] || [[word:jasholojojo|jasholojojo]] || [[word:jasholoshosho|jasholoshosho]] || [[word:jasholoko|jasholoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jasholothon|jasholothon]] || [[word:jasholojon|jasholojon]] || [[word:jasholoshon|jasholoshon]] || [[word:jasholokon|jasholokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jasholothoro|jasholothoro]] || [[word:jasholojoro|jasholojoro]] || [[word:jasholoshoro|jasholoshoro]] || [[word:jasholokoro|jasholokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7318718}}
